caption: A video depicts a meeting of the "House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs" on "April 12, 2019," as indicated by on-screen text. The scene is set in an office or conference room with a projection screen in the background and a wooden desk holding water bottles and a thermos. A man in a dark blue suit and light-colored tie is seated and speaking, gesturing with his hands as he interacts with others. To his left, a woman in a dark blazer holds a piece of paper, while another man in a dark suit is seen from the back. A fourth man, wearing a grey vest over a white shirt, sits further back. A green banner at the bottom of the frame reads "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage," and the "ORCA" logo is visible in the lower left corner. Across the frames, the man in the blue suit shifts his posture and continues gesturing while speaking.
